new_value: OpenCode DB integrity is healthy. Fixed confusion by fetching all origin branches into the single-branch EC2 clone, verified all six recovery commits, and replaced old bd with MarkAtwood/beads tag v1.1.0-flatfile.2 commit 92962e2e while preserving rollback binary. Active OpenCode session exited cleanly and remains resumable.
